mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_safety_device ORDER BY floor_drawing_id, name
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_device WHERE floor_drawing_id = #{floorDrawingId} ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_device WHERE floor_drawing_id = #{floorDrawingId} AND active = 1 ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM tb_safety_device WHERE device_type = #{deviceType} AND active = 1 ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_safety_device (floor_drawing_id, image_file_id, device_type, name, position_x, position_y, description, active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{floorDrawingId}, #{imageFileId}, #{deviceType}, #{name}, #{positionX}, #{positionY}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{active}, 1), GETDATE(), GETDATE())

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO tb_safety_device (floor_drawing_id, image_file_id, device_type, name, position_x, position_y, description, active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{device.floorDrawingId}, #{device.imageFileId}, #{device.deviceType}, #{device.name}, #{device.positionX}, #{device.positionY}, #{device.description}, COALESCE(#{device.active}, 1), GETDATE(), GETDATE())

mapper.update: UPDATE tb_safety_device SET floor_drawing_id = #{floorDrawingId}, image_file_id = #{imageFileId}, device_type = #{deviceType}, name = #{name}, position_x = #{positionX}, position_y = #{positionY}, description = #{description}, active = #{active}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_safety_device SET active = 0, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
